creator: mteterin@mlp.com
text:
On =D0'=D1=D4=CE=C9=C3=D1 21 =C7=D2=D5=C4=C5=CE=D8 2007, Koji Yokota wrot=
e:
=3D +.if ${OSVERSION} < 700007
=3D +# order of -I matters for gcc3;
=3D +# includes of qt4 must be found earlier than those of qt3

Is not this true on all systems -- 6.x, 7.x, 8.x, 5.x?

=09-mi
